titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center records53-23-3192
titlestmt.author: Compiled by

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-01-03 23:21:01 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center

did.abstract: The collection contains files on the establishment of the Resource Office in 1994-1995 and its activities and events through 2010; annual and monthly reports; files on fall retreats; files on the production of a newsletter; files on specific events, subgroups, and activities, including Dialogue, a group on religion (1995-97), sexuality conferences (1995-97), posters and event planning documents; files on Resource Center history and specific issues, including an overall program review in the spring of 1997, the name change in 1998, a file on hate mail and acts of homophobia (1994-99), and a file on controversy over the teaching of a particular class by Prof. Ellis Hanson in 1997 or 1998.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Andrea HektorPeter Martinez, October 2003Sara McDermott, June 2009

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Cornell established the Lesbian, Gay and Bisexual Resource Office in 1994 to serve the entire campus community: students, staff, and faculty. In the Spring of 1998, its name changed to Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center. Susie Lerner (1994-1995), Carlisle Douglas (1995-1998), and Gwendolyn Dean (1998-2008) have led the office as coordinators or director.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Files on the establishment of the Resource Office in 1994-1995; annual and monthly reports; files on fall retreats; files on the production of a newsletter; files on specific events, subgroups, and activities, including Dialogue, a group on religion (1995-1997), sexuality conferences (1995-1997), posters and event planning documents; files on Resource Center history and specific issues, including an overall program review in the spring of 1997, the name change in 1998, a file on hate mail and acts of homophobia (1994-1999), and a file on controversy over the teaching of a particular class by Prof. Ellis Hanson in 1997 or 1998.

Also, files on other LBGT-related Cornell organizations and offices: the establishment of Haven, a program in the Dean of Students Office to serve the counseling and social support needs of Cornell LBGT students and those questioning their sexuality, 1995-2006; files from CUGALA, Cornell University Gay and Lesbian Alumni Association, and an alumni survey, 1995-1998. And some files on relevant past events, including Tompkins County Local Law 6 in 1991, the issue of a GLB Living-Learning Unit at Cornell in 1994, and a Cornell Town Meeting on LGBT Issues in 1996.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center records, #53-23-3192. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Annual report and files from Heather Allore
Conference handout- "Queer Survivors: A Conference on Abuse and Sexual Identity"
Hate mail and documentation of anti-gay acts on campus
Controversy around Prof. Ellis Hanson's course, "The Sexual Child"
Gay youth and other volunteer opportunities
Living In: Lesbian, Gay, & Bisexual Families: a photographic-text exhibit
Heather Allore Speech - Town Meeting on LGBT issues at Cornell University
Notes to New LGBT RC Coordinator, by Carlisle Douglas
Clippings etc. re LGBT campus service
Speech at Southern Tier NY Pride
National Day of Silence Photographs B
Life Cycles: Quality of Life Programs for Staff and Faculty (Cornell University)
Office Manager Report to Advisory Board
Solidarity in Action: A Historical Scrapbook
Health and General LGBT Resource Pamphlets
Gay Asian and Pacific Islander Men of New York Pamphlets
Gay, Lesbian, and Straight Education Network Publications
Parents, Families and Friends of Lesbians and Gays Publications
Protecting Students from Harassment and Hate Crime - A Guide for Schools
Cornell LGBT Resources and Support Brochure, event ephemera including items related to the Farewell to Friends event, 30th Anniversary of Student Homophile League, and a 1998 rainbow tassel
Bisexuality Resource Packet in Braille - part one
Bisexuality Resource Packet in Braille - part two
Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender Resource Center Flyer in Braille
Creating A Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender-Affirming Workplace at Cornell University Flyer in Braille
Causes in Common: Reproductive Rights and LGBT Liberation Pamphlet in Braille
Out for a change: Addressing homophobia in women's sports
Large posters concerning Cornell LGBTQ events, including concerts, drag shows, and talks.
